what is React js

Based on the search results, React JS, also known as React, is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces (UI) with components and JSX syntax. It is developed by Facebook and is used for building single-page applications, particularly for web and native user interfaces. React allows developers to create large web applications that can change data, without reloading the page. It is a free and open-source front-end JavaScript library, maintained by Meta (formerly Facebook) and a community of individual developers and companies.
